title: Arya Ek Deewana
subTitle: After getting separated and growing up differently, two orphan childhood friends reunite and later fall into trouble when they fall in love with the same woman.

title: Heropanti 2
subTitle: A vigilante is sent on a mission by the government to kill enemy troops. However, things go wrong when he's mistaken for the leader of the troops.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Daring Rakhwala
subTitle: An intoxicated dog bites a security guard, unleashes a zombie outbreak. A traffic officer takes up the responsibility to find the antidote.

title: Cirkus
subTitle: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

title: IPC 376
subTitle: A police officer looks into an informer who can predict future murders in a mysterious way. Soon, she unearths a sinister murder mystery that leads to a shocking truth.

title: Bal Hanuman
subTitle: A mischievous Hanuman grows up to become a heroic being who fights all evil creatures and helps Lord Rama in rescuing Sita from Lanka.

title: Legend of the Naga Pearls
subTitle: Stripped of their flight after a defeat by Uranopolis's humans, the Winged Tribe seeks retribution. However, a royal heir must locate the Naga Pearls to avenge their loss.

title: Shivam
subTitle: Shiva is a carefree lad who helps couples in love marry. Soon, he finds his own heart stolen, while being pursued by enemies determined to break them apart.

title: Mahaabali
subTitle: Seenu's debt-driven escape to Dubai accidentally reroutes him to Hyderabad. Upon arrival, a shocking discovery leads him to orchestrate a cunning plan.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Ravanasura
subTitle: Ravindra, an inept junior lawyer at a law firm, agrees to help a business magnate clear her father's name of murder. However, when bodies start piling up, Ravindra begins to show his true colours.

title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
subTitle: Fin and April's flight to New York City hits a hurricane that throws sharks into the air. They must now fight flying sharks to save the city from a weird shark-filled storm.

title: Mahabharat
subTitle: A dynastic struggle between the collateral branches of the Kuru clan, the Kauravas and Pandavas, for the throne of Hastinapur leads to the Kurukshetra War.

title: Ek Rishtaa: The Bond of Love
subTitle: Amid the ideological differences with his father Vijay, Ajay steps up to protect his family from Rajesh's, his brother-in-law's, evil intentions.

title: Dosti: Friends Forever
subTitle: Karan, a wealthy heir, lives a lonely life and is neglected by his family. When he has a fatal accident, Raj, a poor orphan, saves his life and they become inseparable friends.

title: Vaishnavi
subTitle: Born with the divine power, Vaishnavi receives treatment as a goddess by the villagers. After getting killed, she possesses the body of another girl who looks like her to exact revenge for her death.

title: Naach Lucky Naach
subTitle: Ten-year-old Lakshmi dreams of winning a national-level dance competition, but she hesitates to participate when her single mother, Nandini, detests music and dance.

title: Velaiilla Pattadhari
subTitle: Raghuvaran, an educated yet unemployed engineer, is unwilling to accept jobs that are unrelated to his area of expertise. Soon, his mother's tragic death brings him a job as well as grave challenges.

title: Race 3
subTitle: The thirst for power drives a wealthy family to become rivals in a risky heist. As a consequence, they face betrayal and danger along the way.
